query:
INSERT INTO ai_agent_knowledge_bases (deployment_id, agent_id, knowledge_base_id)
            SELECT $1, a.id, kb.id
            FROM ai_agents a
            JOIN ai_knowledge_bases kb ON kb.id = $3 AND kb.deployment_id = $1
            WHERE a.id = $2 AND a.deployment_id = $1
            ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
